extract: Zapapico (Japanese: ピケタウン Piquer Town) is a town in the Paldea region, located at the base of Glaseado Mountain's Dalizapa Passage and East Province (Area Three). In the center of town, there is a man/woman who will trade the player Auspicious Armor/Malicious Armor in exchange for 10 Bronzor Fragments/Sinistea Chips.
